title: Infrastructure (Containers)
description: Per-container CPU and memory from cAdvisor. Series are labeled by raw container id rather than service name (this standalone cAdvisor DaemonSet doesn't get Docker Compose or Kubernetes pod/container labels). Filtered on image!="" rather than a cgroup id path prefix, since that path convention (e.g. /docker/... vs /kubepods.../...) varies by container runtime and cgroup driver.
